theme.archetype: 1 - Organic & Earthy (Adapted for Dark/Cozy: Nocturnal Earth)
theme.vibe: Safe, cozy, intimate, journal-like, respectful, non-clinical. Wraps the user like a warm blanket.

dashboard_hero.description: Shows current fronter. Uses a large avatar and warm typography. Emphasize comfort.
dashboard_hero.classes: flex flex-col items-center justify-center p-12 bg-[#232321] rounded-[2rem] border border-[#7C9082]/20 relative overflow-hidden

quick_switch_button.description: Primary action button to log a switch.
quick_switch_button.classes: bg-[#7C9082] text-[#161615] px-8 py-4 rounded-full font-medium hover:bg-[#677A6D] transition-colors flex items-center justify-center gap-2 shadow-lg shadow-[#7C9082]/10 w-full sm:w-auto

timeline_history.description: Vertical log of fronting history and journal entries.
timeline_history.classes: border-l-2 border-[#A3A099]/10 pl-8 ml-4 relative space-y-8

timeline_dot.classes: absolute -left-[21px] top-2 h-10 w-10 rounded-full bg-[#161615] border-4 border-[#232321] flex items-center justify-center

alter_card.description: Grid items for the Headmates list. Bento-style, spacious.
alter_card.classes: bg-[#232321] p-6 rounded-[1.5rem] border border-white/5 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:border-[#A3A099]/30 transition-all cursor-pointer flex flex-col gap-4

privacy_bucket.description: Card showing friend access settings and trusted people views.
privacy_bucket.classes: p-6 rounded-[1.5rem] border border-white/5 bg-[#1C1C1A] space-y-4

input_field.description: Text inputs and textareas for journaling.
input_field.classes: w-full bg-[#1C1C1A] border border-white/5 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-[#E8E6E1] placeholder:text-[#6B6965] focus:outline-none focus:border-[#7C9082] transition-colors

images.description: Soft warm glowing lights, use as a very low opacity fixed background overlay (opacity-10) to give a night-time cozy feel.
Dark forest scenery, use for the login/auth page background with a heavy dark overlay (bg-black/60).
Abstract watercolor landscape for Alter 1 profile picture.
Abstract colored avatar for Alter 2 profile picture.

instructions_to_main_agent: Load Google Fonts in the index.html or App CSS: 'Cormorant Garamond' (weights 300,400,500) and 'Manrope' (weights 400,500,600).
Use standard Tailwind CSS classes. Build custom UI components for layouts; heavily customize Shadcn logic for forms/dialogs.
Do NOT use pure #000000 or harsh white. Strictly use the provided 'Nocturnal Earth' color palette for all backgrounds, cards, and text to maintain the cozy, safe environment.
Add 'data-testid' attributes (kebab-case, role-based) to all buttons, inputs, and interactive elements. CRITICAL for testing.
Ensure the Google Sign-in flow feels integrated and safe, displaying the 'auth_background' image behind the login card.
Implement the 'Currently Fronting' dashboard using the 'dashboard_hero' styling. Emphasize the alter name using Cormorant Garamond font.
For the fronting history and journal timeline, ensure dates and timestamps are subtly colored using the brand secondary text color. Use the 'timeline_history' and 'timeline_dot' classes.
Do NOT use generic borders. Use 'border-white/5' to create extremely subtle separation lines, making it feel like dark paper rather than digital containers.
The Simply Plural JSON import can be a button triggering a file input, returning mocked success for now, but style the button appropriately.
Keep spacing very generous. Elements should never feel cramped. Use p-6 or p-8 for cards to give a 'journal page' breathing room.
